title: Text Summarization Using Large Language Models: A Comparative Study of MPT-7b-instruct, Falcon-7b-instruct, and OpenAI Chat-GPT Models
description:
Recent advancements in NLP have been characterized by the rise of Large Language
Models (LLMs), OpenAI ChatGPT[1], MPT-7b-instruct[2,3], flan-t5-xl[4],
falcon-7b-instruct[5,6], and others, which have demonstrated remarkable
capabilities in understanding and generating human-like text.
0[7]and the Extreme Summarization (XSum)[8]to assess the
performance of various Large Language Models (LLMs) in the context of text
summarization.
Metrics were computed for each LLM,
offering a comprehensive perspective on their summarization capabilities, as
available on the GitHub repository cited in this paper[13].
